item.title: [Infraestrutura] Mitigating CVE-2026-31431 (“Copy Fail”) in Docker Engine
item.description:
🚨 Mitigating CVE-2026-31431 (“Copy Fail”) in Docker Engine
 
Criticidade: Crítica
Ferramenta: Docker
Fonte: https://www.docker.com/blog/feed/
CVSS: 9.4
Resumo:
CVE-2026-31431 is a Linux kernel vulnerability that was recently disclosed. This CVE does not compromise Docker infrastructure. That said, Docker Engine's default profiles prior to v29.4.3 allowed containers to create AF_ALG sockets, which is the syscall surface the exploit uses. You are not exposed if you are running Docker Engine v29.4.3 or later, OR a...
Link: https://www.docker.com/blog/mitigating-cve-2026-31431-copy-fail-in-docker-engine/

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] CVE-2026-45721 - Windows Server
item.description:
🚨 CVE-2026-45721 - Windows Server
 
Criticidade: Crítica
Ferramenta: Windows Server
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 9.0
Resumo:
Algernon is a small self-contained pure-Go web server. Prior to 1.17.7, when Algernon is asked for any URL path that resolves to a directory without an index file, DirPage walks upward through parent directories — past the configured server root — looking for a file named handler.lua to execute as the request handler. The loop terminates only after 100 ancestor steps or when filepath.Dir returns ., so on any absolute...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-45721

item.title: [Segurança] Active Exploitation Alert: Ghost CMS CVE-2026-26980 Mass Attack Hijacks 700+ Sites for ClickFix Malware Campaigns - Rescana
item.description:
🚨 Active Exploitation Alert: Ghost CMS CVE-2026-26980 Mass Attack Hijacks 700+ Sites for ClickFix Malware Campaigns - Rescana
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A publicação relata a vulnerabilidade CVE-2026-26980 associada a SentinelOne. Vale consultar o link para verificar impacto, versões afetadas e orientações de correção.
Link: https://news.google.?oc=5

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] USN-8315-1: MediaWiki vulnerabilities
item.description:
🚨 USN-8315-1: MediaWiki vulnerabilities
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Ubuntu
Fonte: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/rss.xml
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
It was discovered that MediaWiki incorrectly handled group membership visibility in the OATHAuth extension. An authenticated attacker could use this issue to determine if other users had two-factor authentication enabled. (CVE-2026-34087) It was discovered that MediaWiki incorrectly handled suppressed log entry titles in the RecentChanges list. An unauthenticated attacker could use this issue to view titles of delete...
Link: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/USN-8315-1

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] USN-8319-1: Libgcrypt vulnerabilities
item.description:
🚨 USN-8319-1: Libgcrypt vulnerabilities
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Ubuntu
Fonte: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/rss.xml
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
It was discovered that Libgcrypt incorrectly handled crafted ECDH ciphertext. An attacker could possibly use this issue to cause Libgcrypt to crash, resulting in a denial of service. (CVE-2026-41989) It was discovered that Libgcrypt incorrectly handled Dilithium signing. An attacker could possibly use this issue to cause Libgcrypt to crash, resulting in a denial of service.
Link: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/USN-8319-1

item.title: [Infraestrutura] NGINX Under Active Attack: CVE-2026-42945 and CVE-2026-9256 Put Your Infrastructure at Risk - Security Boulevard
item.description:
🚨 NGINX Under Active Attack: CVE-2026-42945 and CVE-2026-9256 Put Your Infrastructure at Risk - Security Boulevard
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Nginx
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A publicação relata a vulnerabilidade CVE-2026-42945 associada a Nginx. Vale consultar o link para verificar impacto, versões afetadas e orientações de correção.
Link: https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiyAFBVV95cUxOaF9xd2loVFZNZFdkaFM5ODZkU3VPZXlZNEFXQ0FDRDNWa0pNc2E3dkdjdkpsVWctVU16SmdlMDhFVXI4UFZTLWJIVFhCWHpqaWpKekVCZkktbDRLUkthNTZNR253UEh5bmpuUk8zY2xEejF2emNXcVltTWhJbWxELW40Y25EYV92bnpvS0xoUTNvYXNlRThZMHBMUDZUbTFfeFFBb0ZjRjNaMW9aMmd0Y1l0SWhsdWtNeGZLSjdFUV9Va0N6d00yYQ?oc=5

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] CVE-2026-45840 - Ubuntu
item.description:
🚨 CVE-2026-45840 - Ubuntu
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: Ubuntu
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved: openvswitch: cap upcall PID array size and pre-size vport replies The vport netlink reply helpers allocate a fixed-size skb with nlmsg_new(NLMSG_DEFAULT_SIZE, ...) but serialize the full upcall PID array via ovs_vport_get_upcall_portids(). Since ovs_vport_set_upcall_portids() accepts any non-zero multiple of sizeof(u32) with no upper bound, a CAP_NET...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-45840

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] CVE-2025-14481 - WordPress
item.description:
🚨 CVE-2025-14481 - WordPress
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: WordPress
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 4.3
Resumo:
The Yoast SEO plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Insecure Direct Object References in all versions up to, and including, 26.5. This is due to insufficient authorization checks in the Meta Search REST API endpoint that fail to verify post ownership. This makes it possible for authenticated attackers, with Contributor-level access and above, to read sensitive SEO metadata from any post on the site via the 'post_id'...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2025-14481

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] CVE-2025-13755 - Windows Server
item.description:
🚨 CVE-2025-13755 - Windows Server
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: Windows Server
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 5.5
Resumo:
IBM Db2 11.5.0 through 11.5.9, and 12.1.0 through 12.1.4 for Linux, UNIX and Windows (includes DB2 Connect Server) stores potentially sensitive information in log files that could be read by a local user.
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2025-13755

item.title: [Segurança] Gitea Vulnerability Exposes Private Container Images without Authentication
item.description:
🚨 Gitea Vulnerability Exposes Private Container Images without Authentication
 
Criticidade: Baixa
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: 1.2
Resumo:
Cybersecurity researchers have disclosed a security flaw in Gitea, an open-source, self-hosted platform for version control, that allows unauthenticated remote attackers to pull private container images from Gitea deployments without requiring an account, password, or other credentials. The vulnerability, tracked as CVE-2026-27771 (CVSS score: N/A), affects all versions of Gitea prior to 1.26.2
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/05/gitea-vulnerability-exposes-private.html

item.title: [Segurança] CISA gives feds 4 days to patch actively exploited cPanel plugin flaw
item.description:
💣 CISA gives feds 4 days to patch actively exploited cPanel plugin flaw
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA) has given U.S. federal agencies four days to secure their servers against a critical vulnerability in the LiteSpeed cPanel user-end plugin, which is actively being exploited in attacks.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/cisa-gives-feds-4-days-to-patch-actively-exploited-cpanel-plugin-flaw/

item.title: [Segurança] KnowledgeDeliver flaw exploited as a zero-day to install web shells
item.description:
💣 KnowledgeDeliver flaw exploited as a zero-day to install web shells
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Hackers exploited a critical zero-day vulnerability in a server running the KnowledgeDeliver learning management system (LMS) to deploy the Godzilla web shell.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/knowledgedeliver-flaw-exploited-as-a-zero-day-to-install-web-shells/

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] Auglaize County I-75 Traffic Advisory - Mercer County Outlook
item.description:
📢 Auglaize County I-75 Traffic Advisory - Mercer County Outlook
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Office
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A notícia trata de uma falha de execução remota de código relacionada a Office, com potencial impacto importante em ambientes expostos ou mal segmentados.

item.title: [Infraestrutura] Zero Touch Provisioning: Activating Edge Sites with VMware Cloud Foundation Edge 9.1
item.description:
📰 Zero Touch Provisioning: Activating Edge Sites with VMware Cloud Foundation Edge 9.1
 
Criticidade: Crítica
Ferramenta: ESX
Fonte: https://blogs.vmware.com/feed
CVSS: 9.1
Resumo:
Bringing up a new VMware Cloud Foundation (VCF) Edge site traditionally required manual, onsite configuration, a process that does not scale across dozens or hundreds of remote locations. With VCF Edge 9.1, Broadcom delivers Zero Touch Provisioning (ZTP) or vSphere Elastic Provisioning, a capability that automates bare-metal host boot, …
Link: https://blogs.vmware.com/cloud-foundation/2026/05/27/zero-touch-provisioning-activating-edge-sites-with-vmware-cloud-foundation-edge-9-1/

item.title: [Infraestrutura] VCF Breakroom Chats Episode 85 – Cloning Success at Scale: Inside VCF 9.1’s App Stack Formation
item.description:
📰 VCF Breakroom Chats Episode 85 – Cloning Success at Scale: Inside VCF 9.1’s App Stack Formation
 
Criticidade: Crítica
Ferramenta: ESX
Fonte: https://blogs.vmware.com/feed
CVSS: 9.1
Resumo:
VCF Breakroom Chats Episode 85 Welcome to the next episode of the VCF Breakroom Chats. In this episode, Arkadiy Shapiro and Daniel Koeck, Product Management at Broadcom, and Taka Uenishi discuss the new App Stack Formation use case in VMware Cloud Foundation (VCF) 9.1. They explore the use case that empowers platform engineers to capture …
Link: https://blogs.vmware.com/cloud-foundation/2026/05/26/vcf-breakroom-chats-episode-85-cloning-success-at-scale-inside-vcf-9-1s-app-stack-formation/

item.title: [Segurança] CERT-In Recommends 12-Hour Patching for Internet-Facing Flaws Amid AI-Assisted Attacks
item.description:
📰 CERT-In Recommends 12-Hour Patching for Internet-Facing Flaws Amid AI-Assisted Attacks
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
The Indian Computer Emergency Response Team (CERT-In) has issued new guidelines requiring organizations to patch critical security vulnerabilities in internet-exposed systems within 12 hours of being flagged where "feasible" to safeguard against potential threats stemming from threat actors' abuse of artificial intelligence (AI) tools and large language models (LLMs) to automate vulnerability
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/05/cert-in-mandates-12-hour-patching-for.html
